fork_status_and_schedule.highlight: PTC fix will force DevNet 1; only hard fork requirement

epbs_critical_issues.highlight: PTC issue causes state-dependent committee changes; needs decision Monday
4788 will have gaps for empty payloads; protocols prefer backfilling
ELs must support reorgs to parent blocks under ePBS
Finalized/justified heads must send parent hash to engine, not block root

devnet_status.highlight: DevNet 0: Prysm, Lighthouse, Lodestar operational; Nimbus/Teku/Grandine issues
Lighthouse cannot process exits; will break chain if triggered
Prysm missing blocks due to wrong payload hash in FCU

engine_api_redesign.highlight: SSZ Engine API optional transport shows significant blob performance gains
Debate: ship SSZ immediately vs redesign entire Engine API first
ELs want semantic fixes: FCU bundles too much, no deterministic validity checks

hegota_planning.highlight: Non-headliner proposal window opens after EL headliner decision next week
EIP-8148 proposed: custom sweep threshold for 0x02 validators

action_items.action: Review PTC fix PRs 4992 and 5020; decide by Monday ACDT
Contact Lido, Rocketpool, EigenLayer on 4788 impact; analyze proof complexity
Discuss BAL DevNet 2 SFI on next ACDE (March 26)
Review SSZ Engine API PR 764; discuss redesign scope on ACDE

decisions.decision: ELs may return SYNCING during reorgs to parent; CLs will handle optimistically
Target Glamsterdam DevNet 0 mid-April before Interop

targets.target: Monday March 24 ACDT - Decide PTC fix approach
